meta.title: OpenAI’s $500B ‘Stargate’ Project, GPU Export Bans, Musk’s Critique, and DeepSeek’s Reasoning Model
meta.description:

VIDEO Links:
- Stargate at Whitehouse: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=E3HS_LwNKps
- Musk tweets: https://x.com/elonmusk/status/1881923570458304780
- Semianalysis on Texas site: https://semianalysis.com/2025/01/23/openai-stargate-joint-venture-demystified/
- The Information on OpenAI and Softbank investments: https://www.theinformation.com/articles/openai-softbank-each-commit-19-billion-to-stargate-data-center-venture?utm_campaign=article_email&utm_content=article-14368&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sg
- Oracle financials: https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/ORCL/balance-sheet/
- Satya on Stargate: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lb_ZJylekWo
- Export ban map: https://x.com/BeanJD/status/1878448852455322097/photo/1
- Export ban document: https://public-inspection.federalregister.gov/2025-00636.pdf
- DeepSeek on ARC prize: https://x.com/arcprize/status/1881761987090325517
- DeepSeek R1 launch: https://api-docs.deepseek.com/news/news250120
- ARC chart: https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1eG2jiKJnCRhkw-0EEfOF_cRoenidP18tr4LMwBhQGJQ/edit#slide=id.p
- R1 paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2501.12948

TIMESTAMPS:
00:00:00 - Sam Altman announces Stargate launch in D.C. with $500B data center plan
00:00:35 - Masayoshi Son discusses immediate deployment of $100B with $500B goal
00:01:17 - Elon Musk questions funding, Altman confirms Texas site underway
00:02:01 - Breakdown of funding commitments from OpenAI, SoftBank, and Oracle
00:02:51 - Discussion of how Stargate reduces OpenAI's reliance on Microsoft
00:03:25 - Satya Nadella comments on Microsoft's partnership with OpenAI
00:03:53 - Details of Microsoft's investment and equity stake in OpenAI
00:06:58 - Overview of GPU export restrictions and country tiers
00:07:34 - Discussion of countries excluded from GPU allow list
00:08:52 - Explanation of model weights export restrictions
00:09:18 - Introduction of DeepSeek reasoning model
00:10:13 - Performance comparison of DeepSeek models vs OpenAI models
00:11:16 - Explanation of DeepSeek's recursive improvement training approach
00:13:43 - Discussion of data preparation challenges and OpenAI's scaling strategy
